entry.title: Re: Modeling a basic Hierarchy with Directory in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi @RossR the hierarchy showing the Node ID for the Key is a limitation I listed in my blog, and your workaround is the one that would solve that indeed. 

Indeed, configuration changes do not always have effect, if they are made in objects underlying the Analytic Model. In my tests, it showed that re-deploying the Analytic Model solved this, as this usually also redeploys the dependent objects. I stated this in my blog as well. Last week, someone reported that his changes only took effect after redeploying all involved objects. The latter you can try from the data builder overview using the mass deploy option.

entry.title: Re: F1520 Proposed Posting Date Field during Reprocessing...
entry.content: Thank you for your reply. Yes, we have followed the steps in the note. The current date is proposed even though we have not entered an overriding date or saved a draft. I will open a case with SAP. Thanks

entry.title: Seasonal Maintenance strategy
entry.content:
Hello,

I have this requirement to have a monthly call from the maintenace plan from May till October and a 3 monthly call from November till June. 

Is it possible to achieve this by using the SAP maintenance strategies?

Could someone please help me on this?

Many thanks,

Regards,

Ilyas

entry.title: Side effects are not working on smart fields (Fiori Element + RAP)
entry.content:
We are developing a Fiori Element - List Report page application based on CDS annotations (following RAP development model). Our detail object page has multiple UI.facet as sections – SectionA, SectionB and so on. For some business reason we had to extend Object page Details view with a custom section at UI. SectionA is now a custom view at UI. Other sections(like, SectionB) are generated from CDS annotations(UI.facet).

Pic 1- part of manifest.json

Pic 2- part of View.xml  

Pic 3 - UI Detail Object page - Type field as highlighted

We have used UI control - smart fields for dropdown at UI so that it can act based on the service metadata. We have side effect implemented at backend on top of the drop down field (Type - smart field at UI). So that when user changes dropdown selection it triggers side effect. 

When we check the loaded meta data information from network tab, I can see the side effects are part of the metadata.

Pic 4- metadata loaded in network tab

Case1- The side effect does not work when SectionA is created at UI (and dropdown is a smart field). Side effect is not triggered. We checked after keeping a break point at SAP.

Case2- Side effect works perfectly fine when SectionA is generated using CDS annotation without any additional work.

It will be great to get some helpful inputs for the issue. Where to look for why the side effect is not triggering for Case1.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: How to use CDS View in Calculation View?
entry.content:
@Cocquerel, hello again after months 🙂

We used this structure properly in our Development system and did not encounter any problems. However, recently our ERP and BW systems went live. We encountered the following problem in the Live system:

We were pushing the output of the Calculation View, in which this CDS View was used, to a DSO. This logic worked perfectly in the Development system, but when pushing the output of the Calculation View to DSO in the Live system, we sometimes saw that the data came correctly, and sometimes we saw that 0 records came.

Don't get me wrong, when we look at the output of Calculation View, there are approximately 300 thousand rows of data, but sometimes 0 records were received when pushing to DSO. Data extraction is done hourly as Full Load. Sometimes the data comes in correctly, sometimes it doesn't come at all. For this reason, we cannot design the report we want.

If you have any guesses, I'd be happy to hear from you.

entry.title: Re: Modeling a basic Hierarchy with Directory in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: @Sefan_Linders as an update to the 'worry' above, I found if I remove the REP_ITEM dimension from the Analytical model, deploy the model, preview the model, exit the model, go back into the model, add the dimension back into the model, re-deploy the model and then return to the preview that the model is reflecting the changes to the hierarchy configuration. This I can live with.

entry.title: Re: SAC story page filter default selection with Button S...
entry.content: Hello, put this line : console.log(selections); after the first line where you declare var selections. You will see as far as I think that selection is undefinded because there is no result in you table. i think

entry.title: Re: Tables for BW-Query Elements (where-used list)
entry.content: We have 1000 queries. So we cannot check all queries manually.

entry.title: Re: Send employee from NON-SAP-Solutions to SuccessFactors EC
entry.content:
Hi Jason34,

thanks for the reply.

Yes, web services are my solution 😉 Does SF provide any or do you have to programme and implement them in SF yourself? Can I provide SF with standardised endpoints for retrieving the data that can be connected?
I know from other systems that they provide a specific online API and document which endpoints are to be called, which then carry out data changes. I would also expect or wish for something like this from SF.

entry.title: Re: Modeling a basic Hierarchy with Directory in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: @RossR removing and adding should not be necessary. Try my approach listed in my previous response. If that does not work, we should file an incident to get this fixed.

entry.title: Re: Customization of Checkout Feature in Composable Storefront
entry.content: For further study in Composable Storefront, you are always welcome to attend our official training C4H370 , which is Composable Storefront developer oriented. Moreover, if you just want to know Composable Storefront at a high level, one Learning Hub session is provided: Getting started on Composable Storefront Development (fka Spartacus)

entry.title: TRUNCATE TABLE PARTITION takes hours when deleting an empty partition on Sybase ASE 16
entry.content:
We are having a performance issue with our sybase ASE database version 16.0.03.11.

The TRUNCATE TABLE x PARTITION y runs for hours although the actual partition has 0 records.

How does the truncate work when there are 0 records in the partition ? and why would this take so long ? The DROP PARTITION on the other hand is very quick. The table has millions of records and many indexes though the particular partition that is being truncated is empty.

How should I debug such an issue ? what kind of traces can be recorded or checks performed to understand what the DB is doing during the truncate statement.

Appreciate any help as I am not a DB expert.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Signavio Process Manager: RACI Matrix, Role Management and pointers about "A", "C
entry.content:
hi @tomas_koubek 

perhaps  my terminology is very BPMN 2.0 and that created a confusion for you.

In SAP Signavio using the collapsed pool is what creates a Black Box 😀. The official element that SAP Process Manager in shapes is Collapsed Pool, but if you notice, when you roll over it, you can see the explanation, and there you can also see they call it Blackbox.

See screenshot:

 

So when you use the Collapsed Pool element, you are in fact creating a blackbox, and these collapsed pools should always be classified as External Participants.
 

 

The SAP Signavio element under Shapes called Pool/Lane, when used, will adjust to your needs depending on when you drop it in the canvas. 

When you drag it the first time, it will always create One Lane inside One Pool.

See screenshots below: (since I wanted to show the mouse pointer i had to take phone pics, so i could capture the roll over)

 

When you drag again the Pool/Lane element onto the Canvas, then you can drop it on another Pool/Lane, and depending on how you drop it, it can insert lanes beside the current lane, as shown below:

And when you drag it for and drop it for example on a pool with 2 lanes already, you can see that you get prompoted if you want add another plane lane or a sublane.

 

and the result would be this:

 

In this last screen shot, for example, it can be that a company has a role that performs one activity for all countries. 
And then there are 2 other roles, that are grouped togehter for BPMN 2.0 purposes, due to their processes and interaction with the Global role. (this is just something that I have actually used before in one company to make it clear) 

it could look like this:

At the end of the day, what is very important is how to classify the Pools and Lanes in the Dictionary. 

Hope this helps 😀

Cheers!

entry.title: Checkboxes look different for CDS based Fiori Element App
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a Fiori Element - List Report page application developed based on RAP model. We rely on CDS annotation (annotation in backend on metadata extension file) to generate the object page layout. On the Object page we have a section where we have checkbox for user input. SAP data element type is ABAP_BOOLEAN. Nothing else to control the UI element behavior. 

During the runtime checkbox appears like – Label on top and selection checkbox below.

We expect it should look as per Checkbox | SAP Fiori for Web Design Guidelines – Selection checkbox first and Label next but in same line.

 

If anyone knows why checkbox looks different using CDS based - RAP approach rather if we use sap.m.CheckBox element in freestyle approach? Is there anything to do with UI5 version? 

We are using -

minUI5Version: 1.120.0

SAP_UI: 758 SP0001

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Subject: How to Prevent Tables from Loading into Memory in SAP HANA
entry.content: All databases need to load data into memory in order to process queries. Since HANA is an in-memory database the expectation is that all tables are in memory all the time. Can you provide some more context as to why you would have a table in the HANA database that you would never want to be loaded into memory and therefore would never be queried?

entry.title: Unable to navigate any provision to migration DMC projects from Dev env to Quality environment
entry.content:
Transport functionality is not there for Migrate your data application.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to navigate any provision to migration DMC pro...
entry.content: Currently this is not supported in the staging table approach for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. We need to create projects independently in the respective system. For direct transfer you can follow the link : https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d5699934e7004d048c4801b552f3b013/aea373628a9e4cd5bd9dfa9430be7b36.html?locale=en-US&version=latest&q=transport

entry.title: Transação para gerar o Balanço diferente da F.01 e FC10N
entry.content:
Bom dia,

Alguém pode me informar outra opção para gerar o Balanço, que não seja a F.01 e FC10N?

Necessidade de relatório com maior período de comparação.

Desde já, obrigada.

entry.title: Release Navigator for SAP Supply Chain Management solutions - What's New in 2408
entry.content:
I hope you are all excited for the 2408 releases of SAP Supply Chain Management solutions, which are just around the corner! This also means a new UX and content update to the release navigator is coming on August 2. Updates to the release navigator are automatic, yet significant, as they bring new features and content that enhance the usability and functionality of your product. Furthermore, they showcase our ongoing efforts to improve your experience and demonstrate that we are listening to your feedback.

In this blog post, we will cover:

  1. New UX features and content
  2. Updated innovation & content update plan
  3. How to connect with Readiness@Scale

Side Menu

The release navigator now includes a new Side Menu (refer to Figure 1) that enhances user navigation between pages and will be present on every page. This feature will also be implemented across other release navigators for SAP Cloud solutions such as SAP Business Technology Platform, SAP Customer Experience, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and Spend Management & Business Network to create a cohesive design. Further information about the new Side Menu can be found below.

Figure 1: The new Side Menu has been implemented on each page of the release navigator.

 

Product Specific Page

The former home page has been officially rebranded as the new and improved Product-Specific page (refer to Figure 1). This updated page now features significant product release events and specific SAP Supply Chain Management products, along with consolidated resources for your convenience. Any remaining resources that were previously located on the home page have been relocated to other pages, which will be discussed further in the following sections.

 

General Page

The General page (refer to Figure 2) serves as your central access point for release resources related to a variety of SAP Supply Chain Management products, such as the Webcast Lounge and SAP Roadmap Explorer. In addition to release readiness materials, you can also discover supplementary resources covering a wide range of topics. Furthermore, release navigators for other SAP cloud solutions are available on this page.

Figure 2: Browse the new General page for a wealth of useful resources.

 

Get Assistance Page

For assistance with the release navigator and the latest information from Readiness@Scale, you can now access this content on the new Get Assistance page (refer to Figure 3). Additionally, if you require the release navigator in a different language, you can find the link to the authenticated version on this page, which will require an S, D, I, or Universal ID.

Figure 3: Discover specific guidance for using the release navigator on the Get Assistance page.

 

User Feedback Page

Do you have specific recommendations to enhance the user-experience? Is there featured content that you'd like to have included in the release navigator? The User Feedback page (refer to Figure 4) is where you can fill out a brief and anonymous two-question survey that will be directly sent to the developers.

Figure 4: Leave us any recommendations you have via the User Feedback page.

 

Card Badges

A Card Badge offers you additional information to improve your comprehension without adding clutter to the interface. Inside the release navigator, you will see New (refer to Figure 5) above any resource card that contains new & updated content. You may also find Featured above a specific card, which identifies important release information, tools, or content.

Figure 5: SAP Roadmap Explorer & SAP Community for Supply Chain Management are two new General resources.

 

About this Card

To offer more insight about the resources included in the release navigators, About this Card feature has been implemented on the General page resource cards. By selecting the … icon (refer to Figure 6) on each resource card, you can read more information about each resource.

 Figure 6: Learn more about each resource on the General page.

 Here are the highlights of new & updated content within the release navigator: 

 

 Disclaimer: These are only informational dates that could change. The Readiness@Scale team has the final decision over any UX modifications. Please refer to the Release Calendar card on the Product Specific Page (refer to Figure 1) for more accurate dates.

 

If you have feedback or specific requests of what content you would like to see featured in the release navigator, please do not hesitate to let us know! Use our feedback survey or reply to this blog post in the Comments section below. 

You can learn more about how the Readiness@Scale is a cross-solution team responsible for release readiness topics in the SAP Enterprise Support portfolio at our Release Ready page. Find all our teams blogs with the tag Readiness@Scale.

Cheers,

Andrew Ford - Sr. Release Advisor for SAP Cloud ERP

entry.title: Re: Hi, I have few doubts around CBC:
entry.content: Thanks Tamas! that is helpful.

entry.title: Re: SFTP Sender Adapter - Multiple Java Nodes
entry.content: Was this resolved. We are also facing same issue now. SAP suggested 2424450 - Message processed twice at Sender Channel in SFTP Adapter, but I don't think that address the issue of the file getting pulled by multiple nodes

entry.title: SAP CAP Typescript - Error - Could not find a declaration file for module '@sap/cds'
entry.content:
Hello Everyone 

I am using typescript with CAP

After upgrading to new version, I start getting following error

Could not find a declaration file for module '@sap/cds'. '/project/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/index.js' implicitly has an 'any' type.
Try `npm i --save-dev @types/sap__cds` if it exists or add a new declaration (.d.ts) file containing `declare module '@sap/cds';`ts(7016)

for statement

import cds from "@sap/cds";
 
Version details
 
@cap-js/asyncapi: 1.0.1
@cap-js/cds-typer: 0.24.0
@cap-js/openapi: 1.0.4
@cap-js/sqlite: 1.7.1
@Sap/cds: 8.0.3
@Sap/cds-compiler: 5.0.6
@Sap/cds-dk: 8.0.2
@Sap/cds-dk (global): 8.0.2
@Sap/cds-fiori: 1.2.7
@Sap/cds-foss: 5.0.1
@Sap/cds-hana: 2.0.0
@Sap/cds-mtxs: 2.0.2
@Sap/cds-odata-v2-adapter-proxy: 1.9.21
@Sap/eslint-plugin-cds: 3.0.4
Node.js: v20.13.1
 
Also getting error  Cannot find name **** (2304)  for SELECt,DELETE,UPDATE statements
 
Kindly let me know how to fix it

Pardha Reddy.C

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Typescript - Error - Could not find a declaration file for module '@sap/cds'
entry.content:
tscomfig.json

{
"compilerOptions": {
"target": "ES2022",
"module": "NodeNext",
"esModuleInterop": true,
"forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
"strict": true,
"noImplicitAny": true,
"strictNullChecks": true,
"skipLibCheck": true,
"checkJs": true,
"outDir": "./gen/srv",
"rootDir": "./",
"rootDirs": ["src", "tests"],
"baseUrl": "./",
"noErrorTruncation": true,
"moduleResolution": "nodenext",
"typeRoots": ["./src"],
"paths": {
"#cds-models/*": ["./@cds-models/*/index.ts"]
}
},
"include": ["srv"],
"exclude": ["node_modules"]
}

entry.title: Having an issue creating output type for email
entry.content:
Hello,

I have created a new condition and output type to try and send an email to a person that wants to be notified anytime a sales order is created with their plant number.  I can't seem to find how to specify the email address for the user.  The typical partner functions (CP, SP, etc) don't let me specify the email address for this person.  It seems like this should be easy to do and I am just missing something.  Or is this something that can only be done by creating a new Process routine program?  

Thank you

entry.title: Present multiple translated documents in a SAP Enable Now Project display
entry.content:
We are generating a set of Projects which each contain a Simulation.  For each Simulation we are using the Document Generation feature to generate Hands-On Guides. 

We are likewise using the Machine Translation feature to generate the Project in another language.  We are aware in doing so that the Hands-On Guide is not translated so we then create the Hands-On Guide via the translated Project.

We were then hoping to place the translated Hands-On Guide into the Original English Project so multiple hosted Hands-On Guides of different translation were present.  The idea was so they would be listed as shown in this image.  However, this did not work, only the Original English Hands-On Guide is displayed.

Is there anyway to remedy this?

Likewise if other External Word Documents were added to that Project, they again are NOT visible when viewing the project in the following way.

entry.title: Re: Procedure cached plans not reused for new connection
entry.content:
Ahhhh, so this performance issue is occurring in the current environment but is now being magnified by the migration (to azure).

The easy/fast recommendation would be to open a tech support case to find out if there are any known performance issues (and workarounds) related to global temporary tables.

The harder/slower recommendation would be a detailed P&T analysis of the stored proc(s) in question. Without knowing details about your env I'll just dump everything that comes to mind ...

  • if (per feedback from tech support) there is a hard-coded performance hit for using global temporary tables then revisit the reason(s) for using global temporary tables
  • tweak optimizer settings to see if you can reduce the performance hit for using global temporary tables (eg, is the test proc's (re)compile phase faster under allrows_oltp)
  • track down the individual queries that are taking the most time to (re)compile and look at possible steps to speed up the (re)compilation phase (eg, query rewrite, addition of optimizer hints via set and/or abstract query plans)
  • if the (re)compilation overhead is related to UNION queries then consider breaking into separate queries that populate one or more #temp tables (then UNION the #temp tables); primary objective being to reduce optimization complexity and overhead by giving the optimizer smaller, easier  queries to process
  • break a large proc into a series of smaller procs with the idea being to limit the (re)compilation phase to just those (smaller) procs that contain the problematic queries

Some additional comments re: abstract query plans (AQPs):

  • for a query that has a large (re)compilation overhead keep in mind you can capture the AQP (that the optimizer finally generates) and then cut-n-paste said AQP into the query via the plan 'AQP' clause
  • a complete AQP can be quite large but can often be reduced to an equivalent partial (and smaller) AQP but will likely require a bit of trial and error to get correct (especially if you don't do a lot of work with AQPs)
  • see P&T Series: Query Processing and Abstract Plans for details on using AQPs

entry.title: Re: Cannot join any group
entry.content:
@KunalBansal @NA187 Please don't post to threads with accepted answers. It's best to post new questions. There are no updates. As I said, I'll share them once they're available.

--Jerry

entry.title: Re: How to create a full-text index from ZIP or RAR files...
entry.content:
Latest SAP HANA version 2.0 SPS 07 maintains the same policy (look into https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/691cb949c1034198800afde3e5be6570/cc999564bb57101480cb97cbc7b27d0e.html😞

Why not create a mechanism like a script to extract the contents before upload?

entry.content:

On SAP S4 Public Cloud, i need to find the app to define checks intervals (FCHI tcode on S4 On premise). I can already use the App "manage outgoing check", but first i need to define check lot with intervals. 

Could you please tell me if there is a special scope to activate it, or maybe give me the App's ID ? I can't find it, neither on CBC.

Many thanks for your help.

entry.title: Re: Questions for SAC Live Data Connections for BW
entry.content: I mean this part: In step 3 "Add SAP Analytics Cloud to the HTTP allowlist" in part b the option "Scenario to HTTP Allowlist Scenario" appears but I select that but the item "Cross-origin Resource Sharing" is not appearing, should this item appear itself? Or do I need to call him by another way? >> If you go back to steps 1 and 2, you will see 2 options to enable CORS on your ABAP server. The first one disappear after a restart of the ABAP server and the second one will permanently enable the CORS but you will need to restart the ABAP server.

entry.title: Need to set system status to inactive in LMDB
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are planning to perform a patch upgrade on a system that is currently in charm configuration.
The CHARM team has requested us to set the system status to inactive in LMDB before proceeding with the upgrade.
Once the upgrade is completed, we will revert the system status to active.

Could you please advise on the specific location in LMDB where I need to set the system status to inactive in order to proceed with the upgrade?

Regards

Appuru

entry.title: Re: Credit management with multiple rules
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your question.

Can you please check the following SAP Help Portal documentation:

Manage Credit Management Rules:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/918bca53037f408f91a2295d04ac16bc/60d98146673a401e98a103d45f57cfd1.html?locale=en-US

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/918bca53037f408f91a2295d04ac16bc/ab9934b631ee496d8fa36fcd19200fae.html?locale=en-US

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: What's New in SAP Asset Performance Management 2403
entry.content:
Very nice blog! I have just a quick question...

 

I am using APM 2403 and trying to simulate the email functionality using a Gmail SMTP server config. i have done this email sending from the server using other programming languages (i.e., Python or Java) with the same config and had no issues, but when using APM, the rule that should trigger the email is correctly triggered, generates alert but no email is received. I am not sure exactly why, and I have noted that in the video a private SMTP server was used. Do you happen to know or have some tips about this?

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: saml2=disabled security issue
entry.content: Do you have a solution for this ? Please share.

entry.title: VBA code to detect enter and/or press
entry.content:
Hi

How do I detect that you manually press enter or and/or a *.press was given?

--  session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 0
--  session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[0]").press

Gracias

entry.title: Re: SAC Excel MEMERPROPERTY not returning Description
entry.content:
Got it - "Version.Description" instead of "Description" does indeed work.

What about for Measures? There is no properties dialog - and the options I could think of to guess at don't seem to work.

Also - Can this get reflected in the documentation at some point?
The "Analyze and Plan with Formulas" pdf - dated 2024-07-15 does not reflect this behavior, nor does the online documentation.
Both of those sources provide an example, that I believe is no longer correct/valid:

entry.title: Re: SAC story page filter default selection with Button S...
entry.content:
try to add an InputControl selector with Version to your page and use following code

 

var selected_version = InputControl_1.getInputControlDataSource().getActiveSelectedMembersWithUnbooked().values().next().value.id;
var ver = PlanningModel_1.getMember("Version", selected_version);
if (ver){
	if (ver.properties.Start_Period){
	var dateparam = "[Date].[FYP].&[" +ver.properties.Start_Period + "]";
	Table_1.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Date",dateparam);
	}
}

entry.title: Announcement - SAP Stammtisch Plus 2024 at Hyderabad
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community members,

You are cordially invited to the SAP Stammtisch Plus event happening in Hyderabad which will include an engaging morning filled with insightful sessions on BTP, AI, SAP S/4HANA, and networking.

Date: Saturday 3rd August, 2024
Time: 9:30 AM to 12:30 PM
Venue: SAP Callidus Cloud, 6th floor, Building No. 12-B, Raheja Mindspace IT Park (Google Maps)

Please register here!! Registrations are open till Wednesday, 31st July 2024.

Note: This is an In-person Event only

If you have any questions, please get in touch with us at sapcommunityhyderabad@gmail.com. We look forward to reviewing your session submission and featuring your expertise at the event.

Please help spread the word about speaker registration by sharing this post with your network.

We look forward to welcoming you!!

entry.title: Re: How can we check change logs in S4 public cloud?
entry.content: Hey Enda, thanks. But I opened the link you send and this applies to private cloud. We are looking for a way to check the logs in the public cloud.

entry.title: Re: Batch operator script engine service layer sap b1
entry.content:
Hi harryntnguyen,

Using scripts in oData batch is not supported, because scripts are designed as an alternative or replacement to odata batch. Both of them are relevant to database transactions. The difference is that the scripts allow complicated transactions with business logic. This is what we cannot do with odata batch.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Authorization Issue on Connecting Addon getting Error For Two users, others are Working Fine
entry.content:
Hi dinesh_s1,

Kindly confirm the SAP Business One version and patch where the issue is reproducible.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Tables for BW-Query Elements (where-used list)
entry.content: I once did such a search. I've built an SQL that I run in HANA, based on RSZELTDIR and RSZELTXREF tables. This XREF table contains a nested structure of your query elements and I think as well you should be able to find your 1111 value there - but it was quite a while ago, so I hope I remember it correctly.

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Plus - Hyderabad
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community members,

You are cordially invited to the SAP Stammtisch Plus event happening in Hyderabad which will include an engaging morning filled with insightful sessions on BTP, AI, SAP S/4HANA, and networking.

Date: Saturday 3rd August, 2024
Time: 9:30 AM to 12:30 PM
Venue: SAP Callidus Cloud, 6th floor, Building No. 12-B, Raheja Mindspace IT Park (Google Maps)

Please register here!! Registrations are open till Wednesday, 31st July 2024.

Note: This is an In-person Event only

If you have any questions, please get in touch with us at sapcommunityhyderabad@gmail.com. We look forward to reviewing your session submission and featuring your expertise at the event.

entry.title: Re: Getting back to work - Interested in SAP Digital skills initiative
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano, 

I apologize for posting here but I am unable to even make a new post. Hopefully you see this.  

 I am interested in the SAP digital Skills Initiative program. I have been trying to respond to your initial blog post and also trying to create a new post in the Beginner Corner but I keep getting access denied.

My name is Nora and I am a single mother. I am interested in this initiative because I want learn and expand on my current knowledge to further my career. I currently work in Supply Chain and will like to grow my career further.

Thank you for this great initiative.

#Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

entry.title: BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST RF05A-NEWKO Mapping
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

My requirement is to convert BDC to BAPI format. Where should I put RF05A-NEWKO in the BAPI? The only parameters I used was DOCUMENTHEADER, ACCOUNTPAYABLE, CURRENCYAMOUNT and RETURN. Thank you!

entry.title: How to improve the performance of the Migration Cockpit?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We're using the Migration Cockpit's Direct Transfer approach in one of our Migration Projects, and in it we've noticed some long runtimes, depending on the circumstances. Sometimes, even the cancellation of a long running activity takes a little too long to finish. Since we're facing this, we'd like to ask:

  • Is there a way to improve the performance of the Migration Cockpit app?

Best regards,
Data Migration team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to improve the performance of the Migration Cockpit?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Yes, there are multiple ways to improve the performance of the Migrate Your Data - Migration Cockpit app!

First, we'd suggest following the Resolution notes of the KBA bellow:

  • 3428275 - SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit: Migration tasks are stuck (long runtimes)

Even though the KBA above aims to correct stuck activities, making sure that your system is properly configured (all Migration Cockpit users have the necessary Roles, the /LTB/JOB_DISPATCHER is working, a stepuser is maintained, and so on...) is the first step to avoid performances issues, since a misconfigured system will lead to undispatched Migration Cockpit jobs, which might seem like activities that are taking too long to finish (but won't finish at all).

After making sure that your system is correctly set up, we suggest applying the Resolution notes of the following KBA:

  • 3056885 - Performance tips & tricks, SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit: Transfer data directly from SAP system

This KBA lists many relevant technical and non-technical measures that could be followed to guarantee the maximum performance of the app!

I hope this helps with your query and good luck with your future Migration Projects!

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Disable Object Page in List Report Developed in SAP C...
entry.content:
If it is v4, remove the navigation section of that page in your manifest.json

if it is v2, remove the pages section of that page in your manifest.json

entry.title: Re: External Instructors in LMS
entry.content: Hello! I have the same question as rconesa. How should external instructors access the LMS using IAS?

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Plain "REST" endpoint (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content: Task4 is complete

entry.title: Re: Facing error while building and watching CAP project.
entry.content:
I had this error also, seems to be an issue in one of the dependencies, we added this to the package.json

"overrides": {

    "@sap/cds": {

      "@cap-js/cds-types": "0.6.1"

    }

},

entry.title: Automatic interface or job that run to move lockbox deposits from one GL account to another
entry.content:
Hi experts

Is there any automatic interface or job that run to move lockbox deposits from one GL account to another GL account for document type SB

Kindly please share your thoughts

Regards

Jithendra Shivashankar

entry.title: New PA is not visible V_001P_N
entry.content:
i have created a new PA which is showing in T500P and T001P but this new PA is not visible to update PSG grouping for WS (V_001P_N). Eventually not showing in V_001P_ALL 

This PA is created under IMG path PA> PSA  > Assignment of PA to company code. Also This company code is enabled in T500L table 

Please help

entry.title: Migration Cockpit: missing Migration Objects Business partner, Letter of credit and Bank guarantee
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We wanted to test the following Migration Objects in one of our systems, using the Staging Tables migration method:

  • Business partner
  • Letter of credit
  • Bank guarantee

But we can't find them in the Migration Project creation screen!

Is there anything else we need to do or know to use these Migration Objects? We're using an SAP S/4HANA 2021.

Best regards,
Data Migration team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Migration Cockpit: missing Migration Objects Business...
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Indeed, these Migration Objects are freely available in the Migration Cockpit of your SAP S/4HANA 2021, but only by using the Direct Transfer migration method (Transfer data directly from SAP system option). You can check this in their official documentation pages:

  • Business partner | SAP Help Portal
  • TRM - Letter of credit | SAP Help Portal
  • TRM - Bank guarantee | SAP Help Portal

Additionally, in the Help Portal page below, you can always verify the available Migration Objects for each release of the SAP S/4HANA and migration method used:

  • Available Migration Objects | SAP Help Portal

I hope this solves your doubt! Good luck with your future Migration Projects!

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Conditon Record based on WBS Billing Element is not g...
entry.content:
Hi, 

We had the similar requirement, we did struggle to get a proper answer from SAP blogs but there was none. However, we tried going another way and were able to achieve the requirement.

The solution over here is very simple, the provided WBS Element field "WBS_BILL_ELEMENT" in the field catalog when creating the condition table will not help here. Instead, we have to add a new field "PS_PSP_PNR" in the field catalog and then add this field to the condition table.

Path to add new fields to field catalog: SPRO -> Sales Distribution -> Basic Functions -> Pricing -> Pricing Control -> Condition Tables and Field Catalog -> Change Field Catalog for Pricing in Sales

This would resolve the issue and the condition record maintained with respect to WBS Element in Sales order item will be used to fetch the condition value in the order. 

Hope this helps!

entry.title: SAP Enable Now Instant Producer - WerFault.exe error
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

This is my first post ever, so any feedback on how to develop precise and concise questions is always welcomed 😁

For some context, my team and I are working with a client using SAP Enable Now testing transactions while at the same time generating content on Instant Producer for processes documentation.

While the software works perfectly fine, the more the use, its responses start to become slow and we finally get this error.

"The instruction in 0x000000000008FFE7 references the memory in 0x00000000011FFC. Memory couldn't written. Click Aceptar to finalize the software" (Not sure if that is translated correctly)

I am sure this is some sort of memory/hardware problem and the only solution we have found to this is to restart the computer, since restarting SAP Instant Producer is not actually doing anything.

Any thoughts on how to solve this problem rather than only restarting the computer?

Thank you so much in advance,

Sebastián

#SAPEnableNow #SAPInstantProducer

entry.title: XML/JSON Conversion in Rest Adapter for 2 fields with the same name in different nodes
entry.content: My source structure has 2 fields named "id": one under the "client" node and one under "item" node. In the client node it is a string and in the other node an integer. Is there any way to address each one separately in the conversion table? Any workaround for this scenario? I tried doing it like in the picture but it is not working.

entry.title: Re: How to Catch File Format issue in BODS job and send mail alert to Business User
entry.content: Did you ever figure this out? I have a situation that is exactly what you described. The physical file and the flat file format don't match. But the Try/Catch never catches the exception. So a failure email never gets sent out.

entry.title: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Brazil: Usage Analytics Dashboard
entry.content:
(Versão em português aqui)

Hi everyone,

We have released a new feature that enables you to check your usage of SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, inbound and outbound invoicing options for Brazil by giving more accurate information about consumption.

This new feature is only available from the year 2024 onwards for the metric IDs CY140 (outbound) and CY141 (inbound). To know what your metric ID is, check in SAP LUI (License Utilization Information) in the SAP for Me app. More information about SAP LUI is described below.

You access the Usage Analytics dashboard on the left navigation panel in the SAP BTP Cockpit, as shown in the following image:

On the Usage Analytics dashboard, you can find information about SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, inbound and outbound invoicing options for Brazil.

Outbound processes

For outbound processes, we have two classification groups, called Group A and Group B, as shown in the following image:

Leave the filter “Service” blank to display all usages on the screen; not all classifications are being displayed in this image.

Group A

Classifies each document processed (metric definition) by type and action. The Group A consists of:

  • Processed documents (NF-e, CT-e, NFS-e, MDF-e, and NF3-e)
  • Processed event documents (CC-e, cancellation, skipping, and so on)
  • Document files displayed or downloaded*
  • Event files displayed or downloaded*
  • Document resent for approval (NF-e, CT-e, NFS-e, MDF-e, and NF3-e)

*Only when the same XML is downloaded for the second time. This avoids bad consumption.

Access the Cloud (SaaS) Application Usage & SAP Business Technology Platform to check the complete classification list of Group A.

Group B

Classifies each document processed (metric definition) according to the environment type:

  • Production processed documents
  • Homologation processed documents

The sum of documents displayed in Group A must be equal to the sum of documents displayed in Group B. The total number of documents is displayed in “Total documents from group A or B”.

Considering the example from the previous image, the sum of Group A is 1317, and the sum of Group B is also 1317.

Inbound processes

For inbound processes, we also have two classification groups, called Group A and Group B, as shown in the following image:

Leave the filter “Service” blank to display all usages on the screen; not all classifications are being displayed in this image.

Group A

Classifies each document processed (metric definition) by type and action. The Group A consists of:

  • Processed documents (NF-e, CT-e)
  • Processed event documents (CC-e, cancellation, and so on)
  • Document files downloaded from SEFAZ (NF-e, CT-e)
  • Event files downloaded from SEFAZ (CC-e, cancellation, and so on)

Access the Cloud (SaaS) Application Usage & SAP Business Technology Platform to check the complete classification list of Group A.

Group B

Classifies each document processed (metric definition) according to the environment type:

  • Production processed documents
  • Homologation processed documents

The sum of documents displayed in Group A must be equal to the sum of documents displayed in Group B. The total number of documents is displayed in “Total documents from group A or B”.

Considering the example from the previous image, the sum of Group A is 202, and the sum of Group B is also 202.

If you find any discrepancies, ensure that there is no custom coding that calls the cloud service twice or creates a looping effect.

Main options of the Usage Analytics

  • Capability: In the Usage Analytics dashboard, you can use the Capability drop-down to filter the usage of the service by selecting the capabilities of the SAP BTP (application, automation, or integration).
  • Service: In the Service drop-down, you can use it to filter the usage of each service plan in your company's subaccount. For example, you can filter the usage of data from the inbound or outbound invoicing option for Brazil.
  • Metric: You can select one of the metrics (documents that were displayed, downloaded, resent for approval, or processed). You can use the Metric drop-down to avoid showing all documents at the same time.
  • Period: Regarding the time range selected in the Period field, you should be aware that the information presented is from the year 2024 onwards and only after installing the following SAP Notes.

Installation

You can implement these changes by following the instructions on the SAP Notes.

The SAP Notes are required to provide the data used in metrics and to match the value from Group B to the consumption data in the “Total documents from group A or B” label. The installation of SAP Notes does not impact the current billing processes.

  • Outbound: SAP Note 3111469
  • Inbound: SAP Note 3399269

License Utilization Information (LUI)

The License Utilization Information (LUI) application provides an overview of license entitlement and software usage. To receive the results, a system measurement is performed on each relevant system.

The Usage Analytics dashboard can be used together with LUI by selecting the same period to generate insights about how the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance solution is being used. The LUI dashboard is expected to show the same value in column “Measured” as in the “Total document from group A or B” from Usage Analytics.

The LUI application can be accessed through SAP for Me. Check License Utilization Information for details on how to use and access it.


Date of accounting

The date of the metric may not represent the date of the action of the user. For example, there may be discrepancies where a document processed at the end of a month appears in the consumption of the following month, due to the asynchronous process of accounting. The timing of when a user takes an action and when that action is reflected in our metrics may not always align perfectly, especially around the transition between days.

You can contact your account executive if you have questions regarding the values or if you need further assistance. Check SAP Note 2626344.

Related blog posts:

  • How to Easily Browse the SAP Help Portal Pages for Outbound Nota Fiscal
  • How to Easily Browse the SAP Help Portal Pages for Inbound Nota Fiscal

For a step-by-step guide on how to use the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, inbound and outbound invoicing option for Brazil, refer to the following SAP Help Portal pages:

  • SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, outbound invoicing option for Brazil
  • SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, inbound invoicing option for Brazil

You can sign up for email alerts when new SAP Notes are released or updated in the components listed below; just follow the instructions in SAP Knowledge Base Article 2171560.

  • LOD-LH-NFE (Outbound invoicing option for Brazil)
  • CA-GTF-CSC-EDO-BR-OU (Outbound Electronic Nota Fiscal for Electrical Energy, NF3-e)
  • CA-GTF-CSC-EDO-BR (Inbound invoicing option for Brazil)

Use the regulatory change manager tool to find out if a solution to a legal change is planned. Take a look at SAP Knowledge Base Article 3421995 and the regulatory change manager page to understand how to use this tool.

Have you found this blog post useful? If so, choose “like” (kudos), share it with your colleagues, and follow me for similar content.

You are welcome to leave your questions and read similar blog posts on the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance SAP Community. Don’t forget to follow the SAP Electronic Invoicing for Brazil (SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica) tag and the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance community to keep up with the latest NF-e news.

Thank you, and until next time,
Thiago and Bruno

Tags: brasil, einvoice, einvoicing, e-invoicing, electronic invoice, electronic invoicing, edocument, edoc, e-document, e-docs, e-doc, e-docs, drc, document compliance, nota fiscal eletrônica, electronic nota fiscal

entry.title: Unable to generate/open docx - SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

For some context, my team and I are working with a client generating content for process documentation using SAP Enable Now Instant Producer, Producer & Manager.

While the recording of simulations goes well and saves accordingly, I am unable to generate the documentation either in Instant Producer and Producer.

Even if there is indeed a file with a DOC icon appearing in the structure but it is not when I open de folder.

When I go to the manager and try to open the documentation it also shows an error

This is only for DOC and PDF files, since I am able to generate PPTs.

We tried, using the same user in a different computer to generate docs and it did not show ANY PROBLEMS! so it must be something with my computer.

Any thoughts on how to solve this problem? I will be greatly thankful.

Greetings,

Sebastián

#SAPEnableNow #SAPInstantProducer #SAProducer

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Plain "REST" endpoint (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content: Hi @Ruthiel, 101 is an answer, but not the answer (to life, the universe, and everything) 😉

entry.title: How to create custom preconditions and functions for Sales Order Approval Workflow
entry.content:
I need to configure approval workflow for sales orders with some custom requirements:

  1. How can I add a custom pre-condition? (Manage Sales Document Workflows app)
  2. How can I add a custom function for team members? (Manage Teams and Responsibilities app)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to create custom preconditions and functions for...
entry.content:
You can extend the app 'Manage Sales Document Workflows' to include additional workflow preconditions by providing and publishing enhancement implementations for the available Business Add-Ins (BAdIs) in the Custom Logic app.
For more information, see the following documentation: App Extensibility: Manage Sales Document Workflows

To create additional approval functions and function profiles, you can find and perform the following two configuration activities in your configuration environment:

  • Define Functions
  • Define Function Profiles

For more information, see the section 3. 'Team Member Definition' of the following documentation: How to Set Up Approval Workflows in Your System

entry.title: Re: xsjob including a table function
entry.content: Thank you HakanHaslaman for answering

entry.title: Re: If import parameter was not available in BADI, how ca...
entry.content:
Hi SivaSidda,

In S/4HANA Cloud, public edition, I don't believe you have a lot of control over the import parameters for BADIs.

Is this question about Developer Extensibility or Key User Extensibility (i assume Key User Ext)

In this case, please investigate the app Custom Fields and Logic -> Data Source Extensions and see if there is a relevant data source that could be extended.

Failing this, I think you only other option is to use the existing import parameters and query an existing CDS View to see if you can get to the data you need.

For example, do you have the key fields for the PR item where you can query to get to the material?

Thank you
Jerry

entry.title: Re: S4HC CDS view on Supplier that I can filter on Industry
entry.content:
Hi Peter

Sorry I have edited my response, now I see you already found the answer - my browser window had not refreshed with your update.

How about Customer Supplier Industry? Or Business Partner Industry?

I hope this helps

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I am Mohamed Amine Ouerfelli, and I am extremely eager to participate in the SAP Digital Skills Initiative. As a first-generation college student from Tunisia, I have faced numerous challenges in accessing educational resources and career opportunities.

Despite my best efforts, financial constraints and limited access to advanced training have hindered my ability to further develop my skills in SAP technologies. Additionally, in Tunisia, government regulations prevent us from paying for things online, making it even more difficult to access necessary resources and certifications.

I am particularly interested in the "Installing and Administering SAP HANA" course. This course is crucial for my career development, as it would provide me with the expertise needed to manage SAP HANA systems effectively. My background in database management and business intelligence has given me a solid foundation, but I need this program to truly excel and make a meaningful impact.

I am deeply committed to learning and am ready to invest the necessary time and effort to succeed. This chance would not only help me professionally but also enable me to support my family and contribute positively to my community.

Thank you for considering my application. Your support would make an incredible difference in my journey.

Best regards,
Mohamed Amine Ouerfelli

entry.title: Where to view credit memo created using BAPI
entry.content:
Hello!

I created a credit memo using BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST. I only used parameters DOCUMENTHEADER, ACCOUNTPAYABLE, CURRENCYAMOUNT and RETURN.

It already says 'Document posted successfully'. What table or what tcode can I see this posted?

entry.title: Re: Task 5 - A "REST" service document (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&quot
entry.content:
The information that the service is an oData-Service, consisting of the "context" that points to the "$metadata" path and an etag (to check whether the metadata has changed since the last call).

 

{"@odata.context":"$metadata","@odata.metadataEtag":"W/\"8PKoOs3VhYwQoFzBoQObhMsFJJa5jpD1GLFcWZG9r60=\"","value":[{"name":"Books","url":"Books"}]}

 

But when I look into the oData-Documentation the service document should also include "functions" and not only the entity sets. Why is "theAnswer" not included for the Plain-Service there?

 

{"@odata.context":"$metadata","@odata.metadataEtag":"W/\"SX+YOA1v2Tu689g7VahmqbF6pmNXDWy8EHQyPjwySK0=\"","value":[]}

entry.title: Re: Running ABAW Error Msg. AA629
entry.content: adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Finance

entry.title: Re: Define Number Intervals for Checks
entry.content:
Hi @JULIETLRN 

 

The app Manage Check Lots ( FCHI ) is included in the business catalog 

SAP_OILPRA_BC_CHK_LOTS_PC which is available with the activation of the scope item

5NM Revenue Accounting - Oil and Gas Production

 

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('FCHI')/S32

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: List of Roles for Sales Person
entry.content:
Hello,

Can you provide the list of roles mandatory for sales person, finance and supply chain.

Thanks,

Deepika N

entry.title: Re: SAP SD - Rounding Profile in Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi Sumit

we have a following requirement of pallet wise ordering, where for an SKU 1 pallet has 32 cartoons(1 CRT = 3.2Kg). we have created a static rounding profile(in KG) with threshold value 89,5kg(28CRT) and rounding value 102,4 Kg(32 CRT), and assigned the rounding value in material master. the sales order is creating as follows, if enter the quantity between 28 to 32, system is taking 32 as a round up. if i enter the quantity b/w 32 to 64 it's taking the roundup qty as 64, which is not correct.

Also, we are getting following error "Rounding profile not defined" when i am trying to assign the rounding profile in CMIR.

please let me know how to fulfill this requirement and resolve above error.

Thanks,

Kumar

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Document Management free tier: epic fail
entry.content:
Hi @AlexDong , in your comment https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-btp-document-management-free-tier-epic-fail/bc-p/13529191/highlight/true#M156866 you mentioned that you will bring up this issue with the product mgmt. Was there any resolution to this? We just tried it last week and got hit by 1000 API call limit after running CMIS_REPOSITORY_SETUP from S/4. It would make sense to may be make this a monthly limit and not lifetime limit.

@nicolas_busson were you able to find a workaround to this issue?

entry.title: How to set up a workflow with no approvers.
entry.content:
Hi Peers,

I am wanting to create a termination workflow that allows a HR team member that is in the workflow group to submit a termination and not need to proxy as someone else to approve the workflow. 

This is creating duplicative work for us as we are ultimately the approvers of the workflow we are submitting.

 

Thanks!

entry.title: binding an application to hana cloud service is not working, how do we solve it ?
entry.content:
Hi !

we deployed an application "mtar" file using "cf deploy" command but we got an error as like below added image.

It might be related to hana a cloud service broker and then we logged in cloud foundry using other user but the error is occurred also.

how do we solve it. thanks

entry.title: Re: Introducing UI5 linter
entry.content: @matthias_osswald In our case the problem with scanning everything is that our WDIO tests and supporting CLI scripts (NodeJS code, not the UI5 library that the repository contains) are being scanned, which creates are many false positive errors because they're not UI5.  We also have third party dependencies which need to be excluded since they are not UI5 code.  We need to restrict the linter to only scan the actual UI5 library code and QUnit tests, but nothing else.

entry.title: Getting Started with SAP Sales Cloud and Service Cloud V2: Your Ultimate Guide
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community! 

We’re excited to introduce a brand-new e-learning resource designed just for you. If you're looking to implement SAP Sales Cloud and Service Cloud Version 2, you've come to the right place. Our e-learning course will guide you through the initial basic configuration steps, helping you maximize your SAP solutions. Let's dive in and see what you can expect from this awesome learning journey!

Why SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2?

First, let’s discuss why SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 is a game-changer. This version offers cloud-native microservices that ensure uninterrupted service, agility, and flexibility. You'll benefit from out-of-the-box APIs, an event-driven architecture, and enhanced scalability. The best part? You can keep the core clean by leveraging in-app extensibility and side-by-side extensions. This means you can maximize standard offerings without getting bogged down by unnecessary complexity.

What You'll Learn

Our e-learning course is structured to help you hit the ground running with your SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 implementation. Here’s a sneak peek at the units:

Unit 1: Learning Main Configuration Settings

Enable administrators to customize the appearance and behavior of the Sales and Service Cloud Version 2. By the end of this unit, administrators will be able to change themes, logos, and login images, set user inactivity timeouts, and adapt field labels to different languages. This ensures that the system is tailored to meet the company's branding and operational needs.

 Unit 2: Configuring Standard Integrations and Extensibility

This unit covers setting up integration in SAP Sales and Service Cloud Version 2, including enabling standard integrations and configuring communication systems, value mapping, and communication configurations.

Unit 3: Integrating API Hub

Learn to use standard integration packages from SAP Business Accelerator Hub to accelerate the implementation of SAP Service Cloud Version 2 with SAP S/4HANA. Understand the configuration guidelines and explore resources for standard APIs.

 Unit 4: Creating Sample Data Migration Templates

Learn to use data import and export functionalities to efficiently migrate data to SAP Sales and Service Cloud Version 2. This includes downloading templates, preparing data, and importing/exporting data to ensure smooth data migration and updates.

Unit 5: Configuring Data Load Sequence

Learn to plan and execute data replication and migration to SAP Sales and Service Cloud Version 2 by identifying data dependencies and following a structured sequence to ensure a smooth cutover and successful go-live.

Unit 6: Configuring Data Protection Features

Learn to access and download disclosable personal data, set up data retention rules, and perform data depersonalization to ensure compliance with data protection regulations in SAP Sales and Service Cloud Version 2.

Unit 7: Creating Samples

Learn how to create a comprehensive test plan for your SAP Sales and Service Cloud Version 2 implementation, including planning for test cycles, preparing test scenarios, drafting test scripts, and preparing testing data to ensure a successful go-live.

Why This Course?

By the end of this course, you’ll be able to set up your SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 tenant with confidence. You’ll also get guidelines on testing, data migration, and cutover processes. Whether you’re an SAP newbie or a seasoned pro, there’s something valuable here for you.

Ready to Get Started?

Don’t miss out on this opportunity to elevate your SAP skills. Click the link below to explore our e-learning course and start your implementation journey today!

👉Explore the E-Learning Course Now


Remember to access the link above, you are required to complete a one-time registration in SAP Learning Hub, specifically designed for SAP Enterprise Support. You can find a detailed, step-by-step guide to registration here.


Any Questions?

Please, contact the SAP Value Map team! 

Sign up for the SAP Enterprise Support value maps by requesting access to SAP Learning Hub or join the SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps Learning Room if you already have access.

entry.title: SAP Developer News, July 18th, 2024
entry.content:
Podcast Version: SAP Developer News July 18th, 2024 – SAP Developers (opensap.info)

DESCRIPTION

CAP Annual Release

  • CAP Node.js release v8 & Java v3: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/releases/jun24 and https://www.npmjs.com/package/@sap/cds

Fiori Innovation Day

  • SAP Fiori Innovation Day in Chicago: https://events.sap.com/noam/sap-fiori-innovation-day-chicago-2024/en/home

What's New with SAP Datasphere in Q2 2024

  • What's New with SAP Datasphere in Q2 2024: https://www.youtube.com/live/u5eTMpCVZ9E?si=Dn3Z3iWqNNgGRpSx
  • SAP Datasphere BW/4HANA Model Transfer Series (part 1): https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/part-1-prerequisites-and-setup-instructions-for-datasphere-bw-4hana-model/ba-p/13762642
  • SAP Datasphere BW/4HANA Model Transfer Series (part 2): https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/part-2-import-sap-bw-4hana-queries-into-sap-datasphere-using-sap-bw-4hana/ba-p/13759521
  • SAP Datasphere Content NetworkPackage Transport via BTP Transport Management service: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-datasphere-content-networkpackage-transport-via-btp-transport/ba-p/13759735

Sneak Peek into SAP Analytics Cloud release for Q3 2024

  • Sneak Peek into SAP Analytics Cloud release for Q3 2024: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sneak-peek-in-to-sap-analytics-cloud-release-for-q3-2024/ba-p/13758267
  • What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Modeling Extensions & Integration QRC3 2024 Release: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/what-s-new-in-sap-analytics-cloud-modeling-extensions-amp-integration-qrc3/ba-p/13739005

How To Integrate SAP S/4HANA BOR Framework with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh (AEM) using SAP Application Interface Framework (AIF)

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/integration-of-sap-s-4hana-with-sap-integration-suite-advanced-event-mesh/ba-p/13752546

CHAPTERS

0:00 Intro

0:10 CAP Node.js release v8 & Java v3

1:25 SAP Fiori Innovation Day in Chicago

1:54 What's New with SAP Datasphere in Q2 2024

2:34 Sneak Peek into SAP Analytics Cloud release for Q3 2024

3:12 How To Integrate SAP S/4HANA BOR Framework with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh (AEM) using SAP Application Interface Framework (AIF)

TRANSCRIPT

[Kevin] Hey, CAP enthusiasts. Well, it's here. A new CAP major release, CAP Node.js version 8 and CAP Java version 3 are out now. Congratulations to the entire CAP team. There's a ton of features and fixes across pretty much all of CAP's surface area, including the CAP tools and CLI, the CDS language and compiler, both the Node.js and Java runtimes, multi-tenancy, CAP plugins, and running CAP on Kyma/Kubernetes. There's far too much to detail in this news item, so here are just a handful of highlights.

There are no breaking changes to public APIs, and that is amazing. Of course, if you're using undocumented features, there is no guarantee that they will break. There's a new plugin API available to extend the "cds add" family. The new database service architecture for the Node.js runtime runtime is now generally available. Then the protocol adapters for Odata and REST have been completely re-implemented, and those are now generally available, too. There is now support for the consumption of SAP Cloud Identity Services in the Java runtime. And there are new plugins and updates to existing plugins, too. For all details, check out the CAP release notes today.

[Michelle] For all you front-end folks out there, there's an event coming up for you. SAP Fiori Innovation Day is happening in Chicago on August 13th. You should attend this event if you want to learn more about SAP Fiori and SAP UX strategy and innovation. This is a great event for anyone in a technical role or a role that touches app development. You can learn more and register for this all day event by clicking the link in the description below. Happy coding.

[Witalij] This week SAP DataSphere product management team hosted a session where at in this could receive the latest updates on features and functionalities delivered in Q2 2024. The session covered updates on data integration, modeling, and various other topics. If you missed it, the recording is available, please find the link in the description. There are two specific topics worth exploring in details. The SAP Datasphere BW for HANA model transfer series, which provides guidance on how to utilize this feature to import existing analytics queries from your SAP BW for HANA system into SAP Datasphere, and a blog post on how SAP Datasphere and BTP Cloud Transport Management Service collaborate to streamline content transport between dev, test, production, and tenant.

Looking ahead, the SAP Analytics Cloud product team offers a sneak peek into the Q3 release. Among the top five features discussed there are Report-to-Report Interface for Live SAP BW, Just Ask Enhancements, and Standard Unit Conversions explored in-depth in a separate What's New in Modeling extensions and Integration QRC 3 release. Please remember that the roadmap explorer provides a complete and comprehensive list of all features coming in 2024, so both SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud.

[Rich] Hey folks, hope everyone out there is doing well. I have a blog post here to share with you about how to integrate S/4 HANA BOR framework with SAP Integration Suite Advanced Event Mesh or AEM using SAP Application Interface Framework or AIF. So in this blog post, the author mentions how events are becoming increasingly popular for integration scenarios, and I couldn't agree more. They take you step-by-step through the process of wiring up an SAP S/4 HANA system together with an older SAP ERP system, leveraging the capabilities of the event mesh and AIF. I would imagine this type of thing is going to be quite common over the next few years as we move custom roof to us from on a cloud. So take a few minutes and check out this blog post today.

entry.title: Re: Planning strategy 40
entry.content: Your PIR was consumed by the sales order, the system then produced versus your sales order minus the On hand. If the Sales order was additional to the PIR of the month a increment had to be done so that the production order was for the PIR.

entry.title: Re: Quality info record in procurement - user status
entry.content: Hi @matjazmoser, I am seeking your help with the following if possible: I am implementing FAI for a client in SAP Public cloud without PPAP. Thereby, I need to configure status profile at QIR (Quality Info Record) level, but I am not seeing the fild in QI01, and also no config point for status profile in QIR. can you please advice?!

entry.title: Dashboards - Advanced requesting more authorization to display an object
entry.content:
Good Afternoon!

I have a problem, where a user is trying to access a Dashboard, but this dashboard's charts are requesting more authorization from the user in order to be displayed, as demonstrated in the image below:

 

The thing is, my Global Configuration is set in a way, which all charts and dashboards are public for read access:

 

This user business role has the analytics catalog active and with unrestricted access:

My user has an unrestricted read and write attribute permission.

I don't know wheter there are any more places I should be authorizing this particular user, because other users don't have trouble accessing this dashboard's charts.

 

How should I proceed to fix this authorization error?

 

Thank you for your time!

entry.title: Re: SAP Program not available in Advance Financial Close
entry.content:
Hi Darrel,

Thank you for your reply! I checked the configuration related to the Define and Assigning Task model to the task list model. Everything seems to be in place and sync as well.

So now for the time being and as a workaround  I recreated the program with a different variant and followed all the configuration and with sync I can complete the tasks config in AFC.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: How to set up a workflow with no approvers.
entry.content: Do you need to specifically show the workflow was approved for audit or some other reason? Do you have four eye enabled?

entry.title: Use Action Buttons in Operation Activity List plugin in PODs
entry.content:
Introduction

POD Designer Tips and Tricks. In this blog, I will show how can you easily enable and use Action Buttons directly in Operation Activity List POD Plugin, adding flexibility and enabling new use cases.

When enabled, Action Buttons will show in Operation Activity List POD Plugin in the 'Action' column as follows:

Configure it

To enabled this, you must select a 'List' in the Operation Activity List POD Plugin, where 'Multiple Selection' is set to 'OFF'.

To do that, select Operation Activity List POD Plugin and select an existing List or create a new one, making sure 'Multiple Selection' is 'OFF':

After that, still with Operation Activity List POD Plugin selected, scroll down to the bottom of the Configuration panel until you see 'In-Queue' configuration fields, which are displayed when the SFC is New or In-Queue status, and 'In-Work Action' configuration fields, which are displayed when the SFC is In-Work.

When SFCs are New or In-Queue, one potential action would be to start it, which is actually already suggested out of the box in the Label and Tooltip fields. So, to complete this config, select the existing standard 'Start' Action Button in 'In-Queue Action ID'.

When SFCs are In-Work, one potential action would be to complete it, which is actually already suggested out of the box in the Label and Tooltip fields. So, to complete this config, select the existing standard 'Complete' Action Button in 'In-Work Action ID'.

 

In addition to that, as 'Start' and 'Complete' Action Buttons are now configured to show up in Operation Activity List POD Plugin itself, you can hide the existing 'Start' and 'Complete' action buttons by turning their  'Visible' configuration to OFF, for both of them:

Now save your POD and give it a try.

Try it

If you select a New or In-Queue SFC, you should see the new 'Start' button showing up:

If you select an In-Work SFC, you should see the new 'Complete' button showing up:

Which can be used to Start the Complete the selected SFC.

What else?

You can use the same process and configuration to trigger any action button, any other process or flow.

To illustrate that, I created a brand new Action Button called 'Check and Start', which calls a Production Process Design, and linked it to the 'In-Queue Action ID':

Which shows as nicely in Operation Activity List POD Plugin:

And when clicked, performs some handshake and checks with shop floor automation, before starting the SFC.

In addition to 'In-Queue' and 'In-Work' Action configurations, you can also define:

  • Operation Activity List Action ID: That triggers an action button when a row is selected.
  • Operation Activity List Page Navigation: That triggers a navigation when a row is selected.

Which can be used only one at a time, not both at the same time, and are triggered when a row (an operation activity) is selected in the Operation Activity List POD Plugin.

Keep in mind that, if 'Auto Select' is ON at Operation Activity List POD Plugin Configuration panel, this Action or Navigation will always be triggered automatically.

Experiencing SAP Digital Manufacturing

You can have a glimpse and experience several aspects of SAP Digital Manufacturing via the Interactive Value Journeys below:

SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights
Discrete Manufacturing in Private Cloud, powered by SAP
Discrete Manufacturing in Public Cloud, powered by SAP
Process Industry Manufacturing with SAP Digital Manufacturing
AI-driven Visual Inspection powered by SAP
Real-Time Operations Monitoring in SAP Digital Manufacturing
Installation Points in SAP Digital Manufacturing

Do you like this post? Please let me know in the comments section what you think. Any feedback is highly appreciated.

Or, if you have any questions, please check SAP Community Q&A Area, or comment down below.

Thanks,
Manoel Costa

entry.title: Re: Onboarding 2.0: E-Mails are not delivered to Onboardees with Comcast E-Mail Adresses
entry.content: Is it in Production? We are seeing an issue where emails aren't received to gmail from our preview instance, but they are received from Prod.

entry.title: Re: System roles in RBP
entry.content: Have you looked at View User Permission to verify that the HR Manager role is the only one granting the access that you want to remove?
